name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3
notes: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3: 21 x 17.5 mm, ESP32-C3 (single-core RISC-V, 4 MB flash). 11 GPIOs broken out as D0-D10, 7 pads per side.
The D0-D10 to GPIO map is specific to this model - a XIAO ESP32-S3 or C6 uses different GPIOs behind the same silkscreen.
GPIO2 (D0), GPIO8 (D8) and GPIO9 (D9) are strapping pins; GPIO9 is also the BOOT button. Keep the detachable u.FL antenna attached for usable range.
